description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a hip roof covered in gray shingles and a large covered front porch supported by white columns. The exterior walls are painted white, and the house features a combination of small rectangular windows and a main entry door at the front. The porch area is bordered by a simple railing, and the house sits on a rectangular green lawn. On one side of the house, there are three rectangular utility or decorative structures placed on the grass. The roof has a moderate pitch and extends over the porch, providing shade and shelter. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A single-story white house with a gray hip roof, covered front porch, and simple rectangular windows, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with white columns, main entry door, and three rectangular structures on the right lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, a small window, and the three rectangular structures positioned on the left lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with a single window and the hip roof extending over the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch railing, two windows, and the side entrance area under the roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with white columns, simple railing, and a single main door
